data.name: All_Products_Deleted_MSG
data.value: All the product(s) in this order has been deleted and cannot be reordered.

data.name: Deleted_Product_Proceed_To_CheckOut_Msg_Single
data.value: has been deleted and cannot be ordered. Please untick this product and then continue.

data.name: Waiting_For_Approval
data.value: This email id is already used and its waiting for approval.

data.name: Please_make_sure_your_passwords_match
data.value: Please make sure your passwords match.

data.name: You_have_no_items_in_your_shopping_cart
data.value: You have no items in your shopping cart.

data.name: Campaign_sdeleted_during_Checkout_validator
data.value: Campaign(s) are deleted for the selected items

data.name: Copy_the_above_to_Invoice_Address
data.value: Copy the above to Invoice Address

data.name: Warning_Msg_Multiple_Users_Order_during_Checkout
data.value: Warning you are ordering on behalf of multiple people in this cart check out process.The Delivery & Invoice address applied to this order will be the address of the person ordering and this will apply to all items in this cart.

data.name: You_can_only_order_50_items_at_one_time
data.value: You can only order 50 items at one time. Please untick some items and order those that are ticked. You can then return to the cart and order up to another 50 items in a second order

data.name: If_you_proceed_to_Order_this_will_be_a_Back_Order
data.value: If you proceed to order this will be a backorder

data.name: Are_you_sure_you_want_to_delete_this_campaign
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this campaign?

data.name: All_Price_Are_EX_GST_Or_EX_VAT
data.value: All prices are ex sales tax

data.name: Use_above_address_as_my_default_Invoice_address
data.value: Use above address as my default Invoice address

data.name: Your_Last_Edit_Profile_Approval_Is_Pending
data.value: Your Last edit profile approval is pending

data.name: Thankyou_For_Your_Order_and_OrderNumber
data.value: Thank you for your order and order number

data.name: Approver_password_not_contains_in_this_Account
data.value: Approver password not contains in this Account

data.name: Email_Address_Example
data.value: Please enter a valid email address. For example johndoe@domain.com

data.name: Accoutns_On_Hold
data.value: "A new record cannot be created because customer's account is on hold."

data.name: Campaign_Validator_Cart_Page_Key_During_Checkout
data.value: The items you have selected to checkout from the cart are from more than one campaign. Please checkout items for one campaign at a time.

data.name: Stock_allocated_with_back_order_successfully
data.value: Stock allocated with back order successfully

data.name: Thank_you_for_your_order_and_your_order_number_is
data.value: Thank you for your order, your order number is

data.name: Click_here_to_return_to_Login_screen
data.value: Click here to return to the login screen.

data.name: Approval_Feature_Disabled_Msg
data.value: The Approval feature for this system has been disabled. Please contact Administrator.

data.name: Category_ApprovalNot_Req_ShoppingCart_Validation_Msg
data.value: You are not allowed to checkout as some items requires approval

data.name: Please_Enter_Delivery_Required_By
data.value: Please enter delivery required by date

data.name: Please_select_atlease_one_checkbox
data.value: Please select an item from the cart to checkout

data.name: I_want_to_Replenish_the_Stock
data.value: I want to Replenish the Stock

data.name: designated_approver_email_not_contains_in_this_Account
data.value: designated approver email not contains in this Account

data.name: Example_Note
data.value: eg: My Stationalry Item,My Company Order

data.name: The_password_has_been_send_to_your_Email
data.value: The password has been sent to your Email

data.name: you_use_to_login_to_Eprint_Your_password_will_be_emailed_to_this_address
data.value: you use to login to Eprint. Your password will be emailed to this address.

data.name: Please_enter_reason_for_rejecting_the_order
data.value: Please enter reason for rejecting the order

data.name: IncorrectLink
data.value: The link is incorrect. Please contact Administrator.

data.name: If_you_are_approved_your_login_details_will_be_sent
data.value: If you are approved your login details will be sent to you by email.

data.name: I_have_Previewed_the_PDF_and_considered_to_be_correct
data.value: I have Previewed the PDF and considered to be correct

data.name: Additional_Options_Stock_allocated_for_Job
data.value: Additional Options Stock allocated for Job

data.name: Add_Department_Note
data.value: If your department name does not appear above, please click on the + icon to add it

data.name: Stock_allocated_with_backorder_for_Job
data.value: Stock allocated with backorder for Job

data.name: Deleted_Product_Proceed_To_CheckOut_Msg
data.value: has been deleted and cannot be ordered. Please untick these products and then continue.

data.name: Prod_NoMoreExists_MSG
data.value: This product no more exists , please contact your Administrator.

data.name: replenish_proceedtocheckout_validation_msg
data.value: You cannot proceed the items both Replenish Stock and Non Replenish Stock items.

data.name: Copy_the_above_to_Delivery_Address
data.value: Copy the above to Delivery Address

data.name: Example_Note_For_CheckOut
data.value: eg: My Stationery Item,My Company Order

data.name: Back_order_not_available_for_this_stock
data.value: Back order not available for this stock

data.name: It_is_not_currently_available_for_you_to_Order
data.value: It is not currently available for you to Order

data.name: To_reset_your_password_enter_the_email_address
data.value: To reset your password, enter the email address

data.name: Reorder_Deleted_Msg2
data.value: has been deleted and cannot be reordered. If you wish to continue please click OK.

data.name: Use_above_address_as_my_default_Delivery_Address
data.value: Use above address as my default Delivery Address

data.name: This_Product_is_out_of_Stock
data.value: This product is out of stock

data.name: Please_note_this_order_has_gone_to_Back_Order
data.value: Please note this order has gone to back order.

data.name: You_have_no_additional_address_entries_in_your_address_book
data.value: You have no additional address entries in your address book.

data.name: Please_enter_quantity_in_the_multiples_of
data.value: Please enter quantity in the multiples of

data.name: Click_here_to_go_back_to_Login_Page
data.value: Click here to go back to Login Page

data.name: Please_note_some_of_your_ordered_has_gone_to_Back_Order
data.value: Please note some of your ordered has gone to back order

data.name: Please_Check_Atleast_One_Row_To_Delete
data.value: Please check at least one row to delete

data.name: Email_address_already_exists_please_enter_another_email_address
data.value: Email address already exists please enter another email address

data.name: Please_enter_valid_Width_and_Height
data.value: Please enter valid Width and Height

data.name: Please_enter_a_valid_email_address
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Please_check_terms_and_conditions
data.value: Please tick the box to confirm the order can be placed

data.name: Print_ReadyFile_Preview_Confirmation
data.value: I confirm that the PDF is correct

data.name: The_email_which_you_have_entered_does_not_exist_in_our_system
data.value: The email which you have entered does not exist in our system.
